record.field: Internal scope: bachit tilki zavdannya, de vin assignee/follower, i proekti z tsimi zavdannyami.
Bitrix task employee: project visibility via own task

[(1, '=', 1)] if (user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else ['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('create_uid', '=', user.id), ('message_partner_ids', 'in', user.partner_id.id), ('task_ids.user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('task_ids.x_task_watcher_user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('task_ids.message_partner_ids', 'in', user.partner_id.id), ('task_ids.x_bitrix_auditor_employee_ids.user_id', '=', user.id), ('task_ids.x_bitrix_originator_employee_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('task_ids.x_bitrix_creator_employee_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('collaborator_ids.partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id)]
Bitrix task employee: allow task creation by self
Bitrix task employee: guard collaborator visibility

[(1, '=', 1)] if (user.has_group('project.group_project_manager') or user.has_group('base.group_system')) else ['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id), ('project_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.create_uid', '=', user.id), ('project_id.message_partner_ids', 'in', user.partner_id.id), ('project_id.task_ids.user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.x_task_watcher_user_ids', 'in', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.message_partner_ids', 'in', user.partner_id.id), ('project_id.task_ids.x_bitrix_auditor_employee_ids.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.x_bitrix_originator_employee_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.task_ids.x_bitrix_creator_employee_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('project_id.collaborator_ids.partner_id', '=', user.partner_id.id)]
